=== КЛЮЧИ ===

ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIA55OsJMhobQNRF88OLAT6UTK42GUN8vZFRxeZGc0l00 openclaw-hp
=== ПРАВА ===
700 root:root

=== SSHD ===

command: echo '=== КЛЮЧИ ===' && cat /root/.ssh/authorized_keys && echo '=== ПРАВА ===' && stat -c '%a %U:%G' /root/.ssh /root/.ssh/authorized_keys /root && echo '=== SSHD ===' && grep -E '^PasswordAuth|^PubkeyAuth|^AuthorizedKeys|^PermitRoot' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
intent: Проверка SSH конфигурации: ключи, права, настройки sshd
